content.text: Now a **Pipeline** coordinator that wires the services together (shared by the CLI and the module), so the orchestration isn't duplicated:

input.content:
<?php
/**
 * End-to-end coordinator: sync → enrich → classify → score → store. Shared by
 * the CLI and the PrestaShop module so the flow lives in one place.
 *
 * Idempotent and cost-aware: a ticket is only re-classified (an API call) when
 * its content hash changed; SLA-sensitive scoring is recomputed every run since
 * wait time grows over time (docs/03, docs/04).
 */
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Daktela\Service;

use Daktela\Provider\Classification;
use Daktela\Store\TicketStore;

final class Pipeline
{
    private SyncService $sync;
    private EnrichmentService $enrichment;
    private ClassificationService $classification;
    private PriorityService $priority;
    private TicketStore $store;

    public function __construct(
        SyncService $sync,
        EnrichmentService $enrichment,
        ClassificationService $classification,
        PriorityService $priority,
        TicketStore $store
    ) {
        $this->sync = $sync;
        $this->enrichment = $enrichment;
        $this->classification = $classification;
        $this->priority = $priority;
        $this->store = $store;
    }

    /**
     * @return array{processed:int,classified:int,reused:int,flagged:int,records:array<int,array<string,mixed>>}
     */
    public function run(?string $since = null, int $limit = 100): array
    {
        $processed = $classified = $reused = $flagged = 0;

        foreach ($this->sync->pullTickets($since, $limit) as $base) {
            $existing = $this->store->getByName((string) $base['daktela_name']);

            $reuse = $existing !== null
                && (string) ($existing['content_hash'] ?? '') === (string) $base['content_hash'];

            if ($reuse) {
                $classification = $this->fromStored($existing);
                ++$reused;
            } else {
                $classification = $this->classification->classify(
                    (string) $base['title'],
                    (string) $base['latest_inbound_text'],
                    null
                );
                ++$classified;
            }

            $enrichment = $this->enrichment->enrich((string) $base['contact_email']);
            $manual = isset($existing['manual_score']) && $existing['manual_score'] !== null
                ? (int) $existing['manual_score'] : null;

            $score = $this->priority->score(
                $classification,
                $enrichment,
                ['waiting' => (bool) $base['waiting'], 'wait_seconds' => (int) $base['wait_seconds']],
                $manual
            );

            $record = array_merge($base, $enrichment, $score, [
                'classification' => $classification->toArray(),
            ]);
            // Carry forward an existing manual attribution for the DB store.
            if ($existing && isset($existing['manual_score_by'])) {
                $record['manual_score_by'] = $existing['manual_score_by'];
                $record['manual_score_at'] = $existing['manual_score_at'] ?? null;
            }

            $this->store->save($record);
            ++$processed;
            if (!empty($score['flagged'])) {
                ++$flagged;
            }
        }

        return [
            'processed' => $processed,
            'classified' => $classified,
            'reused' => $reused,
            'flagged' => $flagged,
            'records' => $this->store->allRanked($limit),
        ];
    }

    /** Rebuild a Classification from a stored record (array or flat DB row). */
    private function fromStored(array $existing): Classification
    {
        if (isset($existing['classification']) && is_array($existing['classification'])) {
            $raw = $existing['classification'];
            return Classification::fromRaw($raw, (string) ($raw['model_used'] ?? 'stored'));
        }
        $keyPhrases = $existing['key_phrases'] ?? '[]';
        if (is_string($keyPhrases)) {
            $keyPhrases = json_decode($keyPhrases, true) ?: [];
        }
        return Classification::fromRaw([
            'category' => $existing['category'] ?? 'other',
            'urgency' => $existing['urgency'] ?? 'low',
            'sentiment' => $existing['sentiment'] ?? 'neutral',
            'is_question' => (bool) ($existing['is_question'] ?? true),
            'language' => $existing['language'] ?? 'en',
            'summary' => $existing['summary'] ?? '',
            'key_phrases' => $keyPhrases,
            'confidence' => $existing['confidence'] ?? 0,
        ], (string) ($existing['model_used'] ?? 'stored'));
    }
}

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `PREFIX_daktela_ticket` (
    `id_daktela_ticket` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `daktela_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `title` VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    `contact_email` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    `stage` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    `last_inbound_at` DATETIME NULL,
    `last_outbound_at` DATETIME NULL,
    `waiting` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `wait_seconds` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `content_hash` CHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    `category` VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
    `urgency` VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'low',
    `sentiment` VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'neutral',
    `is_question` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    `confidence` DECIMAL(4,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `language` VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en',
    `summary` VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    `key_phrases` TEXT NULL,
    `model_used` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    `order_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `total_spend` DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `has_open_order` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `last_order_at` DATETIME NULL,
    `date_add` DATETIME NOT NULL,
    `date_upd` DATETIME NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id_daktela_ticket`),
    UNIQUE KEY `daktela_name` (`daktela_name`),
    KEY `waiting` (`waiting`),
    KEY `category` (`category`)
) ENGINE=ENGINE_TYPE DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `PREFIX_daktela_ticket_score` (
    `id_daktela_ticket_score` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
    `id_daktela_ticket` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    `sentiment_pts` DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `category_pts` DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `urgency_pts` DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `value_pts` DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `sla_pts` DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `ai_score` DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `manual_score` INT NULL,
    `manual_score_by` VARCHAR(128) NULL,
    `manual_score_at` DATETIME NULL,
    `effective_score` DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `flagged` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    `weights` TEXT NULL,
    `date_upd` DATETIME NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id_daktela_ticket_score`),
    UNIQUE KEY `id_daktela_ticket` (`id_daktela_ticket`),
    KEY `effective_score` (`effective_score`)
) ENGINE=ENGINE_TYPE DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

content.text: Now the **CLI entry point** (`cli/sync.php`) — HTTP-guarded, supports `--mock`/`--provider`/`--limit`/`--json`, and auto-detects PrestaShop vs standalone:

input.content:
<?php
/**
 * Daktela sync CLI / cron entry point.
 *
 *   php cli/sync.php [--mock] [--provider=mock|groq|gemini|anthropic]
 *                    [--limit=N] [--since="Y-m-d H:i:s"] [--json]
 *
 * Auto-detects PrestaShop: if a config/config.inc.php is found above the module
 * it boots PS (real orders + DB persistence); otherwise it runs standalone with
 * an in-memory store and mock customer stats — ideal for testing with fixtures.
 *
 * Refuses to run over HTTP (docs/06 §4): a sync must never be web-triggerable.
 */
declare(strict_types=1);

if (PHP_SAPI !== 'cli') {
    http_response_code(403);
    exit("This script can only be run from the command line.\n");
}

require __DIR__ . '/../src/autoload.php';

use Daktela\Client\DaktelaClient;
use Daktela\Client\MockDaktelaClient;
use Daktela\Service\ClassificationService;
use Daktela\Service\EnrichmentService;
use Daktela\Service\Pipeline;
use Daktela\Service\PriorityService;
use Daktela\Service\SyncService;
use Daktela\Provider\ProviderFactory;
use Daktela\Store\DbTicketStore;
use Daktela\Store\MemoryTicketStore;
use Daktela\Support\Config;

$opts = daktela_parse_args($argv);
$useMock = isset($opts['mock']);
$limit = isset($opts['limit']) ? max(1, (int) $opts['limit']) : 100;
$since = $opts['since'] ?? null;
$asJson = isset($opts['json']);

// --- bootstrap PrestaShop if present -----------------------------------------
$psRoot = daktela_find_prestashop(__DIR__);
$insidePs = false;
if ($psRoot !== null) {
    require_once $psRoot . '/config/config.inc.php';
    $insidePs = class_exists('\\Db');
}

// --- config (with optional --provider override) ------------------------------
$config = new Config();
if (!empty($opts['provider'])) {
    $config = $config->withProvider((string) $opts['provider']);
}

// --- Daktela client ----------------------------------------------------------
if ($useMock) {
    $client = new MockDaktelaClient();
} else {
    if ($config->baseUrl() === '' || $config->token() === '') {
        fwrite(STDERR, "Missing DAKTELA_BASE_URL / DAKTELA_ACCESS_TOKEN. Use --mock to run on fixtures.\n");
        exit(1);
    }
    $client = new DaktelaClient($config->baseUrl(), $config->token());
}

// --- store + enrichment (DB vs standalone) -----------------------------------
if ($insidePs) {
    $store = new DbTicketStore();
    $enrichment = new EnrichmentService(true);
} else {
    $store = new MemoryTicketStore();
    $enrichment = new EnrichmentService(false, daktela_load_customer_fixtures());
}

$pipeline = new Pipeline(
    new SyncService($client),
    $enrichment,
    new ClassificationService(new ProviderFactory($config)),
    new PriorityService($config),
    $store
);

// --- run ---------------------------------------------------------------------
$t1Provider = $config->tierProvider(1);
$t2Provider = $config->tierProvider(2);
fwrite(STDERR, sprintf(
    "Daktela sync — source=%s, ps=%s, tier1=%s, tier2=%s\n",
    $useMock ? 'mock' : 'live',
    $insidePs ? 'yes' : 'standalone',
    $t1Provider,
    $t2Provider
));

try {
    $result = $pipeline->run($since, $limit);
} catch (\Throwable $e) {
    fwrite(STDERR, 'Sync failed: ' . $e->getMessage() . "\n");
    exit(1);
}

if ($asJson) {
    echo json_encode($result, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES), "\n";
    exit(0);
}

daktela_print_table($result);
exit(0);

// --- helpers -----------------------------------------------------------------

/** @return array<string,string|bool> */
function daktela_parse_args(array $argv): array
{
    $out = [];
    foreach (array_slice($argv, 1) as $arg) {
        if (strncmp($arg, '--', 2) !== 0) {
            continue;
        }
        $arg = substr($arg, 2);
        if (str_contains($arg, '=')) {
            [$k, $v] = explode('=', $arg, 2);
            $out[$k] = $v;
        } else {
            $out[$arg] = true;
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

/** Walk up looking for a PrestaShop install. */
function daktela_find_prestashop(string $from): ?string
{
    $dir = $from;
    for ($i = 0; $i < 8; ++$i) {
        $dir = dirname($dir);
        if ($dir === '' || $dir === '/' || $dir === '.') {
            break;
        }
        if (is_file($dir . '/config/config.inc.php') && is_file($dir . '/init.php')) {
            return $dir;
        }
    }
    return null;
}

/** @return array<string,array<string,mixed>> email => order stats */
function daktela_load_customer_fixtures(): array
{
    $path = __DIR__ . '/../tests/fixtures/customers.sample.json';
    if (!is_file($path)) {
        return [];
    }
    $decoded = json_decode((string) file_get_contents($path), true);
    $rows = $decoded['result']['data'] ?? $decoded['data'] ?? $decoded ?? [];
    $byEmail = [];
    foreach ((array) $rows as $row) {
        if (!empty($row['email'])) {
            $byEmail[strtolower((string) $row['email'])] = $row;
        }
    }
    return $byEmail;
}

/** @param array{processed:int,classified:int,reused:int,flagged:int,records:array} $result */
function daktela_print_table(array $result): void
{
    printf(
        "\nProcessed %d ticket(s): %d classified, %d reused, %d flagged for review.\n\n",
        $result['processed'],
        $result['classified'],
        $result['reused'],
        $result['flagged']
    );
    printf("%-4s %6s %-3s %-16s %-11s %-8s %-9s %-26s %s\n",
        '#', 'SCORE', 'FLG', 'CATEGORY', 'SENTIMENT', 'URGENCY', 'WAITING', 'CONTACT', 'SUBJECT');
    echo str_repeat('-', 110), "\n";

    $rank = 0;
    foreach ($result['records'] as $r) {
        ++$rank;
        $c = $r['classification'] ?? $r;
        printf("%-4d %6.1f %-3s %-16s %-11s %-8s %-9s %-26s %s\n",
            $rank,
            (float) ($r['effective_score'] ?? 0),
            !empty($r['flagged']) ? ' ! ' : '',
            substr((string) ($c['category'] ?? $r['category'] ?? ''), 0, 16),
            substr((string) ($c['sentiment'] ?? $r['sentiment'] ?? ''), 0, 11),
            substr((string) ($c['urgency'] ?? $r['urgency'] ?? ''), 0, 8),
            daktela_hms((int) ($r['wait_seconds'] ?? 0), !empty($r['waiting'])),
            substr((string) ($r['contact_email'] ?? ''), 0, 26),
            substr((string) ($r['title'] ?? ''), 0, 50)
        );
    }
    echo "\n";
}

function daktela_hms(int $seconds, bool $waiting): string
{
    if (!$waiting) {
        return '-';
    }
    $h = intdiv($seconds, 3600);
    $m = intdiv($seconds % 3600, 60);
    return $h > 0 ? "{$h}h{$m}m" : "{$m}m";
}

<?php
/**
 * Daktela sync CLI / cron entry point.
 *
 *   php cli/sync.php [--mock] [--provider=mock|groq|gemini|anthropic]
 *                    [--limit=N] [--since="Y-m-d H:i:s"] [--json]
 *
 * Auto-detects PrestaShop: if a config/config.inc.php is found above the module
 * it boots PS (real orders + DB persistence); otherwise it runs standalone with
 * an in-memory store and mock customer stats — ideal for testing with fixtures.
 *
 * Refuses to run over HTTP (docs/06 §4): a sync must never be web-triggerable.
 */
declare(strict_types=1);

if (PHP_SAPI !== 'cli') {
    http_response_code(403);
    exit("This script can only be run from the command line.\n");
}

require __DIR__ . '/../src/autoload.php';

use Daktela\Client\DaktelaClient;
use Daktela\Client\MockDaktelaClient;
use Daktela\Service\ClassificationService;
use Daktela\Service\EnrichmentService;
use Daktela\Service\Pipeline;
use Daktela\Service\PriorityService;
use Daktela\Service\SyncService;
use Daktela\Provider\ProviderFactory;
use Daktela\Store\DbTicketStore;
use Daktela\Store\MemoryTicketStore;
use Daktela\Support\Config;

$opts = daktela_parse_args($argv);
$useMock = isset($opts['mock']);
$limit = isset($opts['limit']) ? max(1, (int) $opts['limit']) : 100;
$since = $opts['since'] ?? null;
$asJson = isset($opts['json']);

// --- bootstrap PrestaShop if present -----------------------------------------
$psRoot = daktela_find_prestashop(__DIR__);
$insidePs = false;
if ($psRoot !== null) {
    require_once $psRoot . '/config/config.inc.php';
    $insidePs = class_exists('\\Db');
}

// --- config (with optional --provider override) ------------------------------
$config = new Config();
if (!empty($opts['provider'])) {
    $config = $config->withProvider((string) $opts['provider']);
}

// --- Daktela client ----------------------------------------------------------
if ($useMock) {
    $client = new MockDaktelaClient();
} else {
    if ($config->baseUrl() === '' || $config->token() === '') {
        fwrite(STDERR, "Missing DAKTELA_BASE_URL / DAKTELA_ACCESS_TOKEN. Use --mock to run on fixtures.\n");
        exit(1);
    }
    $client = new DaktelaClient($config->baseUrl(), $config->token());
}

// --- store + enrichment (DB vs standalone) -----------------------------------
if ($insidePs) {
    $store = new DbTicketStore();
    $enrichment = new EnrichmentService(true);
} else {
    $store = new MemoryTicketStore();
    $enrichment = new EnrichmentService(false, daktela_load_customer_fixtures());
}

$pipeline = new Pipeline(
    new SyncService($client),
    $enrichment,
    new ClassificationService(new ProviderFactory($config)),
    new PriorityService($config),
    $store
);

// --- run ---------------------------------------------------------------------
$t1Provider = $config->tierProvider(1);
$t2Provider = $config->tierProvider(2);
fwrite(STDERR, sprintf(
    "Daktela sync — source=%s, ps=%s, tier1=%s, tier2=%s\n",
    $useMock ? 'mock' : 'live',
    $insidePs ? 'yes' : 'standalone',
    $t1Provider,
    $t2Provider
));

try {
    $result = $pipeline->run($since, $limit);
} catch (\Throwable $e) {
    fwrite(STDERR, 'Sync failed: ' . $e->getMessage() . "\n");
    exit(1);
}

if ($asJson) {
    echo json_encode($result, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES), "\n";
    exit(0);
}

daktela_print_table($result);
exit(0);

// --- helpers -----------------------------------------------------------------

/** @return array<string,string|bool> */
function daktela_parse_args(array $argv): array
{
    $out = [];
    foreach (array_slice($argv, 1) as $arg) {
        if (strncmp($arg, '--', 2) !== 0) {
            continue;
        }
        $arg = substr($arg, 2);
        if (str_contains($arg, '=')) {
            [$k, $v] = explode('=', $arg, 2);
            $out[$k] = $v;
        } else {
            $out[$arg] = true;
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

/** Walk up looking for a PrestaShop install. */
function daktela_find_prestashop(string $from): ?string
{
    $dir = $from;
    for ($i = 0; $i < 8; ++$i) {
        $dir = dirname($dir);
        if ($dir === '' || $dir === '/' || $dir === '.') {
            break;
        }
        if (is_file($dir . '/config/config.inc.php') && is_file($dir . '/init.php')) {
            return $dir;
        }
    }
    return null;
}

/** @return array<string,array<string,mixed>> email => order stats */
function daktela_load_customer_fixtures(): array
{
    $path = __DIR__ . '/../tests/fixtures/customers.sample.json';
    if (!is_file($path)) {
        return [];
    }
    $decoded = json_decode((string) file_get_contents($path), true);
    $rows = $decoded['result']['data'] ?? $decoded['data'] ?? $decoded ?? [];
    $byEmail = [];
    foreach ((array) $rows as $row) {
        if (!empty($row['email'])) {
            $byEmail[strtolower((string) $row['email'])] = $row;
        }
    }
    return $byEmail;
}

/** @param array{processed:int,classified:int,reused:int,flagged:int,records:array} $result */
function daktela_print_table(array $result): void
{
    printf(
        "\nProcessed %d ticket(s): %d classified, %d reused, %d flagged for review.\n\n",
        $result['processed'],
        $result['classified'],
        $result['reused'],
        $result['flagged']
    );
    printf("%-4s %6s %-3s %-16s %-11s %-8s %-9s %-26s %s\n",
        '#', 'SCORE', 'FLG', 'CATEGORY', 'SENTIMENT', 'URGENCY', 'WAITING', 'CONTACT', 'SUBJECT');
    echo str_repeat('-', 110), "\n";

    $rank = 0;
    foreach ($result['records'] as $r) {
        ++$rank;
        $c = $r['classification'] ?? $r;
        printf("%-4d %6.1f %-3s %-16s %-11s %-8s %-9s %-26s %s\n",
            $rank,
            (float) ($r['effective_score'] ?? 0),
            !empty($r['flagged']) ? ' ! ' : '',
            substr((string) ($c['category'] ?? $r['category'] ?? ''), 0, 16),
            substr((string) ($c['sentiment'] ?? $r['sentiment'] ?? ''), 0, 11),
            substr((string) ($c['urgency'] ?? $r['urgency'] ?? ''), 0, 8),
            daktela_hms((int) ($r['wait_seconds'] ?? 0), !empty($r['waiting'])),
            substr((string) ($r['contact_email'] ?? ''), 0, 26),
            substr((string) ($r['title'] ?? ''), 0, 50)
        );
    }
    echo "\n";
}

function daktela_hms(int $seconds, bool $waiting): string
{
    if (!$waiting) {
        return '-';
    }
    $h = intdiv($seconds, 3600);
    $m = intdiv($seconds % 3600, 60);
    return $h > 0 ? "{$h}h{$m}m" : "{$m}m";
}

<?php
/**
 * Offline heuristic classifier. No network, no API key. Produces plausible,
 * deterministic classifications from keywords so the full pipeline can be
 * tested against mock data (docs/04 "Mocking", docs/06-dev guidance).
 *
 * It is intentionally simple — for real quality, point a tier at groq/gemini/
 * anthropic. The output schema is identical, so downstream code is unaffected.
 */
declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Daktela\Provider;

final class MockProvider implements LlmProvider
{
    public function name(): string
    {
        return 'mock';
    }

    public function model(): string
    {
        return 'heuristic-v1';
    }

    public function classify(string $subject, string $message, ?string $langHint = null): Classification
    {
        $text = mb_strtolower($subject . ' ' . $message);
        $has = static fn(array $needles): bool => self::containsAny($text, $needles);

        // Non-genuine messages (auto-replies / newsletters) → demoted later.
        $isQuestion = !$has(['out of office', 'auto-reply', 'autoreply', 'automated message',
            'do not reply', 'noreply', 'newsletter', 'unsubscribe to stop']);

        // Category (first match wins, ordered by business weight).
        [$category, $phrase] = self::category($text);

        // Sentiment.
        $sentiment = 'neutral';
        if ($has(['furious', 'unacceptable', 'terrible', 'worst', 'ridiculous', 'scam', 'angry', '!!!'])
            || (substr_count($message, '!') >= 2)) {
            $sentiment = 'angry';
        } elseif ($has(['disappointed', 'still waiting', 'again', 'frustrat', 'not happy', 'fed up'])) {
            $sentiment = 'frustrated';
        } elseif ($has(['thank', 'great', 'appreciate', 'happy', 'love'])) {
            $sentiment = 'satisfied';
        }

        // Urgency.
        $urgency = 'low';
        if ($has(['urgent', 'asap', 'immediately', 'right now', 'critical'])) {
            $urgency = 'critical';
        } elseif ($sentiment === 'angry' || $has(['today', 'late', 'days late', 'still not'])) {
            $urgency = 'high';
        } elseif (str_contains($text, '?')) {
            $urgency = 'medium';
        }

        $needsDeep = in_array($category, ['payment', 'complaint', 'returns_refunds'], true)
            || mb_strlen($message) > 400;

        $confidence = $category === 'other' ? 0.35 : 0.7;

        return Classification::fromRaw([
            'category' => $category,
            'is_question' => $isQuestion,
            'urgency' => $urgency,
            'sentiment' => $sentiment,
            'language' => $langHint ?: self::guessLanguage($text),
            'summary' => self::summary($message),
            'key_phrases' => array_values(array_filter([$phrase])),
            'confidence' => $confidence,
            'complexity' => $needsDeep ? 'high' : 'low',
            'needs_deep_reasoning' => $needsDeep,
        ], $this->name() . ':' . $this->model());
    }

    /** @return array{0:string,1:string} category and the phrase that matched */
    private static function category(string $text): array
    {
        $rules = [
            'payment' => ['payment', 'paid', 'charged', 'double charge', 'card declined', 'invoice', 'billing'],
            'returns_refunds' => ['refund', 'return', 'money back', 'send it back'],
            'complaint' => ['complaint', 'broken', 'damaged', 'wrong item', 'defective', 'terrible', 'unacceptable'],
            'order_status' => ['where is my order', 'where is my parcel', 'my order', 'tracking', 'not arrived',
                "haven't received", 'still waiting for my', 'delivery', 'days late'],
            'shipping' => ['shipping cost', 'shipping options', 'courier', 'delivery cost', 'how long to ship'],
            'product_question' => ['in stock', 'available', 'colour', 'color', 'size', 'warranty', 'specs',
                'compatible', 'how much is'],
            'account' => ['password', 'log in', 'login', 'my account', 'unsubscribe', 'reset'],
        ];
        foreach ($rules as $cat => $needles) {
            foreach ($needles as $needle) {
                if (str_contains($text, $needle)) {
                    return [$cat, $needle];
                }
            }
        }
        return ['other', ''];
    }

    /** @param string[] $needles */
    private static function containsAny(string $haystack, array $needles): bool
    {
        foreach ($needles as $n) {
            if (str_contains($haystack, $n)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    private static function guessLanguage(string $text): string
    {
        if (preg_match('/[ľščťžýáíéäôň]/u', $text)) {
            return 'sk';
        }
        if (preg_match('/[řůě ]objedná|dobr[ýy] den/u', $text)) {
            return 'cs';
        }
        return 'en';
    }

    private static function summary(string $message): string
    {
        $one = preg_replace('/\s+/u', ' ', trim($message)) ?? '';
        return mb_substr($one, 0, 140);
    }
}

        foreach ($rules as $cat => $needles) {
            foreach ($needles as $needle) {
                if (str_contains($text, $needle)) {
                    return [$cat, $needle];
                }
            }
        }
        return ['other', ''];
    }

    /** @param string[] $needles */
    private static function containsAny(string $haystack, array $needles): bool
    {
        foreach ($needles as $n) {
            if (str_contains($haystack, $n)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    private static function guessLanguage(string $text): string
    {
        if (preg_match('/[ľščťžýáíéäôň]/u', $text)) {
            return 'sk';
        }
        if (preg_match('/[řůě ]objedná|dobr[ýy] den/u', $text)) {
            return 'cs';
        }
        return 'en';
    }

    private static function summary(string $message): string
    {
        $one = preg_replace('/\s+/u', ' ', trim($message)) ?? '';
        return mb_substr($one, 0, 140);
    }
}
